summary: A compilation of Fox News television segments (Laura Ingraham's 'The Angle' with chyrons 'CRIMINALS DEPORTED, OTHERS HAVE CHANCE TO REAPPLY,' a New York Post headline card, and a Fox report on deportations with Kristi Noem). It is cable-news content.
notable_text: CRIMINALS DEPORTED, OTHERS HAVE CHANCE TO REAPPLY
